mapper.select: /* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkCompanyList: 관리자 회사 업무 회사 목록 조회 */ SELECT WORK_COMPANY_SEQ , WORK_COMPANY_NM , WORK_PLATFORM_NM , DISP_ORD FROM WORK_COMPANY_INFO ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, WORK_COMPANY_SEQ ASC

/* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkProjectList: 관리자 회사 업무 프로젝트 목록 조회 */ SELECT WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_SEQ , WORK_COMPANY_SEQ , WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_NM , DISP_ORD FROM WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_INFO WHERE WORK_COMPANY_SEQ = #{workCompanySeq} ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_SEQ ASC

/* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkImportCompanyInfo: 관리자 회사 업무 가져오기 대상 회사 정보 조회 */ SELECT WORK_COMPANY_SEQ , WORK_COMPANY_NM , WORK_PLATFORM_NM , API_URL FROM WORK_COMPANY_INFO WHERE WORK_COMPANY_SEQ = #{workCompanySeq}

/* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkStatusList: 관리자 회사 업무 비완료 상태 목록 조회 */ SELECT J.WORK_SEQ , J.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ , J.WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_SEQ , J.WORK_STAT_CD , J.WORK_KEY , J.TITLE , DATE_FORMAT(J.WORK_CREATE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS WORK_CREATE_DT , DATE_FORMAT(J.WORK_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS WORK_START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(J.WORK_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS WORK_END_DT , J.WORK_PRIOR_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('WORK_PRIOR', J.WORK_PRIOR_CD) AS WORK_PRIOR_NM , J.IT_MANAGER , J.CO_MANAGER , DATE_FORMAT(J.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT , DATE_FORMAT(J.UDT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UDT_DT FROM WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_JOB J JOIN COMMON_CODE WORK_STAT_CODE ON WORK_STAT_CODE.GRP_CD = 'WORK_STAT' AND WORK_STAT_CODE.CD = J.WORK_STAT_CD AND WORK_STAT_CODE.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND J.WORK_STAT_CD != 'WORK_STAT_05' ORDER BY WORK_STAT_CODE.DISP_ORD ASC, J.WORK_CREATE_DT DESC, J.WORK_SEQ DESC

/* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkCompletedList: 관리자 회사 업무 완료 목록 조회 */ SELECT J.WORK_SEQ , J.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ , J.WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_SEQ , J.WORK_STAT_CD , J.WORK_KEY , J.TITLE , DATE_FORMAT(J.WORK_CREATE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS WORK_CREATE_DT , DATE_FORMAT(J.WORK_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS WORK_START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(J.WORK_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS WORK_END_DT , J.WORK_PRIOR_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('WORK_PRIOR', J.WORK_PRIOR_CD) AS WORK_PRIOR_NM , J.IT_MANAGER , J.CO_MANAGER , DATE_FORMAT(J.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT , DATE_FORMAT(J.UDT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UDT_DT FROM WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_JOB J
AND J.WORK_STAT_CD = 'WORK_STAT_05' ORDER BY J.WORK_CREATE_DT DESC, J.WORK_SEQ DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

/* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkCompletedCount: 관리자 회사 업무 완료 목록 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_JOB J
AND J.WORK_STAT_CD = 'WORK_STAT_05'
